title: When any update is posted

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to figure out how to create a custom automation using this as a template:

Ideally I would like to create an automation as follows:

When any update is posted in this Group and contains keywords, move to this Group

Is this possible?

posts.author: LaunchMe (Shawna Culp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Richard,

You are not alone in this! There is a feature request thread you could add to here
and here.

Since we are limited to these 5 options (below) for now, and they lack keyword or column update options, I would recommend considering a workaround.

Screenshot 2023-08-14 at 1.07.10 PM1152×858 54.2 KB

As a workaround, create a new column to represent the keywords as a status, dropdown, or number and implement a workflow that if an update is made, you set the column. I would recommend a Status if possible. So, the automation below would be a part of the process:

  1. The user navigates to the board and locates the item
  2. The user creates an Update
  3. The user then sets the Status (aka keyword)
  4. This automation will run:
    Screenshot 2023-08-14 at 1.14.56 PM1130×684 28.3 KB

Depending on your use case there may be other workarounds that are a better fit, but hopefully that gets the wheels turning.

Thanks for your question!
Shawna at Launch Point

–If you should want more customized support, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us at info@launchpointco.com
